title: FlipSide RP
description: Modpack focused on optimization and enhancing experience on vanilla servers
body:
![FlipSide RP modpack title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d39ef6293beb62620284b062aa33a80e8be85df.png)

Simple Minecraft modpack, focused on optimization and enhancing playing experience on vanilla servers(SMPs)

**Latest update:** FlipSide RP 5 modpack(version 2.0) with 1.21.5 support is out!

<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>

- 3D Skin Layers
- Advancement Plaques (only in 1.0.0)
- Animatica
- AppleSkin
- Better Advancements
- Better Mount HUD
- Better Third Person
- BetterF3
- Blur+
- CICADA 
- CIT Resewn (only in 1.0.0)
- Chat Animation [Smooth Chat]
- Chat Heads
- Cherished Worlds
- Cloth Config API
- Clumps
- Continuity
- Controlling
- Ctrl Q
- Cull Leaves
- Dynamic FPS
- Eating Animation (only in 1.0.0)
- Enhanced Block Entities (only in 1.0.0)
- Entity Culling
- Euphoria Patches
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Falling Leaves
- Gamma Utils (Fullbright)
- Held Item Info
- Iceberg (only in 1.0.0)
- Iris Shaders
- Item Highlighter (only in 1.0.0)
- MidnightControls
- Mod Menu
- More Chat History
- No Chat Reports
- Not Enough Animations
- Presence Footsteps
- Reese's Sodium Options
- ReplayMod
- Searchables
- Show Me Your Skin! (only in 1.0.0)
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Simple Voice Chat
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Status Effect Bars
- Stendhal
- Text Placeholder API
- Visuality
- Xaero's World Map
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- Zoomify
- [EMF] Entity Model Features
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features

</details>


<details>
<summary>Included Shaders</summary>

- BSL Shaders - Original
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
- Rethinking Voxels
- Super Duper Vanilla
- Outlines [Contours] (only in 2.0)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Included Resource packs</summary>

- Default Dark Mode
- Fresh Animations
- Fresh Moves
- Motschen's Better Leaves
- Default Dark Mode: Expansion (only in 2.0)

</details>

## Performance
Thanks to modern performance mods like Sodium, Iris and others, modpack improves your FPS

## Multiplayer in mind
FlipSide RP modpack was made with multiplayer in mind, so **does not** include mods, that may not work on servers, but includes what is needed to enhance multiplayer experience
